历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 11695 → 17134 → 9627 → 10856 → 10738. In 2022, due to a decrease in the provincial control line, there was a noticeable backward shift in ranking. From 2023 to 2025, it stabilized in the 9600–10800 range. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 10738. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shanxi Province was 75 students in 2021–2022, 73 in 2023–2024, and 74 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 69 students, a reduction of about 6.8% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 88th in 2026 (86th in 2025), with recent rankings stable in the 86–102 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to teacher ethics incidents), which may slightly suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 90th overall), with moderate short video exposure. Pharmacy is rated A+ (top nationally). Majors such as Traditional Chinese Medicine and Pharmacy are directly linked to the A+ discipline, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. Biopharmaceuticals, Clinical Pharmacy, and other majors also benefit from the advantage of the pharmacy discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for pharmacy/medical-related majors continues to be high. The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that clinical medicine, pharmacy, and similar fields remain highly recommended. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,400, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,300 in 2025, slightly easing competition. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university in Shanxi. Shanxi is not a major source province for this university; in recent years, the proportion of Shanxi students enrolled is about 2%–5%, with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 9600–10800 range, the approximately 6.8% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the approximately 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, the upward effect on ranking due to enrollment reduction is slightly greater than the mitigating effect of candidate reduction. Combined with a slightly negative reputation signal, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will increase slightly compared to the 2025 baseline (ranking number increases, competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10353, with a range of 9853–10853.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9853–10853, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine) as the main direction, with Tier 1 top innovation classes as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9853), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class, Top Innovation Class).
